reason: No isolated solved kf=1.0, 0.85, and 0.70 evidence exists yet. The axis-aligned five-piece model has an unvalidated abrupt leg/yoke anisotropy transition.

source_contract.lamination_factor_policy: 0.70 is a user-selected native Lamination A/B candidate, not a datasheet value and not merely a post-loss multiplier; production remains unselected until solved A/B
source_contract.loss_margin_interpretation: engineering margin, not a measurement fit
source_contract.permeability_model: constant mu_r=3000 existing assumption; no datasheet BH attestation
source_contract.bulk_conductivity: 0 S/m to avoid double counting empirical core loss

required_execution_modes: isolated non-graphical full voltage-driven AC Magnetic
isolated non-graphical eighth current-driven loss_sym cross-check
approval_rule: Do not deploy, mix with b171 data, or call the model physically equivalent until every solved metric is present and all numerical gates pass. Any corner-interface collapse requires a rounded/sector/curvilinear orientation model.
